# Extended Matrix — production robots policy.
# Site lives at https://www.extendedmatrix.org (the apex extendedmatrix.org
# redirects to www per the GitHub Pages + CNAME setup). The sitemap is
# auto-generated at build time by @astrojs/sitemap and emitted as
# /sitemap-index.xml (then /sitemap-0.xml etc.).

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://www.extendedmatrix.org/sitemap-index.xml
